(a) The commission may establish, as it considers necessary, advisory committees on any of the matters under its jurisdiction.

(b) The commission shall determine the purpose, duties, and membership of each advisory committee.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.117 — Advisory Committees

(a) The commission may establish, as it considers necessary, advisory committees on any of the matters under its jurisdiction.

(b) The commission shall determine the purpose, duties, and membership of each advisory committee.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 469 (S.B.348), Sec. 1, eff. June 19, 2009.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The commission may establish, as it considers necessary, advisory committees on any of the matters under its jurisdiction.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The commission shall determine the purpose, duties, and membership of each advisory committee.
